name: Green Tomato Salsa 1
recipeIngredient: 1/2 red bell pepper, seeded and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the green tomatoes, jalapeno peppers, garlic, cilantro, and parsley in a food processor or blender.
2. Blend until a coarse puree forms.
3. Add the red bell pepper, lime juice, sugar, and salt to the mixture.
4. Continue blending until well combined.
5. If using immediately, add 1 tablespoon of water if the salsa seems too thick.
6. If refrigerating until ready to use, do not add water. The vegetables will release liquid as the salsa sits.
7. Makes about 1 1/2 cups.
